goal: /my-published view in apps/planning-app: server reads marketplace-index.generated.json and filters generations where publishedBy === getOperatorId(). Solo-operator mode shows everything publishedBy 'solo-operator'; Clerk mode shows the signed-in user's generations only. Each row links to /projects/edit/[id] (revert/manage) and to the public playable URL. Empty state explains how to publish.
